comment: Golden-set cases for the policy-advisor gap analysis. Checks are case-insensitive substrings matched (whitespace-collapsed) against the COVERED/PARTIAL/GAP report. status=reviewed marks items whose expected results have been reviewed; status=draft would mark items still awaiting review. Strict items assert an exact status; lenient items only forbid the wrong status, to tolerate reasonable COVERED/PARTIAL wobble.

items.description: A thorough policy that is itself an accessible, maintained privacy policy with a complaints channel should satisfy APP 1.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The thorough policy limits collection to what is reasonably necessary and requires consent for sensitive information, so APP 3 must not be reported as a gap.
items.notes: lenient: COVERED or PARTIAL both acceptable.

items.description: The thorough policy names destination countries and contractual safeguards for overseas disclosure, so APP 8 must not be reported as a gap.
items.notes: lenient: COVERED or PARTIAL both acceptable.

items.description: The thorough policy describes concrete safeguards (encryption, access control, training, testing) and a destruction/de-identification practice, satisfying APP 11.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The thorough policy gives an access-request process with response time and written refusal reasons, satisfying APP 12.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The sparse startup notice lists what is collected but gives no identity/contact, access, correction or complaint information, so APP 5 cannot be fully covered.
items.notes: lenient: PARTIAL or GAP both acceptable.

items.description: The sparse startup notice says nothing about protecting personal information or destroying it when no longer needed, a clear APP 11 gap.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The sparse startup notice offers no way for individuals to access their information, a clear APP 12 gap.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The sparse startup notice has no correction process at all, a clear APP 13 gap.
items.notes: strict: this exact status is required.

items.description: The retail policy runs unavoidable direct marketing with partner sharing and no opt-out mechanism, so APP 7 cannot be covered.
items.notes: lenient: PARTIAL or GAP both acceptable. Fixture deliberately has good security language so only APP 7 is at issue.

items.description: The hosting policy discloses data to unspecified overseas providers chosen on price, with no safeguards or accountability language, so APP 8 cannot be covered.
items.notes: lenient: PARTIAL or GAP both acceptable.
